sections.heading: Backend(dev) Services Prompt Pack
sections.prose:
- Scope: experimental service hardening and path to production quality.
- Core prompt: Convert prototype flow into testable, observable service behavior.
- Small tasks: isolate core logic -> add config/env strategy -> tests -> runbook note.
